jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Livspace
jsonLd.description:
Join the Livspace family as a SEO Specialist in Bengaluru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Livspace:
Livspace is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Livspace!
